# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions currently receive security updates:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | ✅        |
| older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability:

- **Do NOT open a public issue** ❌  
- Use GitHub **Private Vulnerability Reporting** (Security Advisories)

### Steps
1. Go to the repository **Security** tab
2. Click **Report a vulnerability**
3. Fill in the details and submit privately

### Please include
- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected version(s) / branch
- Proof of concept (if available)

## Response Process

- We aim to acknowledge reports within 48 hours  
- Verified issues will be investigated and fixed  
- A security advisory may be published if needed  
- Please do not disclose the issue publicly until a fix is released  

## Disclosure Policy

- Responsible disclosure is expected  
- Public disclosure is allowed after a fix is available  

## Security Updates

- Critical issues are prioritized  
- Patches/releases will be published when necessary  

## Credits

Reporters may be acknowledged (optional, can remain anonymous)
